title: aizoon glinoides
intro:
Aizoon glinoides, also known as rock-jasmine or sandwort, is a flowering succulent plant native to the Mediterranean region, characterized by its tiny white flowers and small leaves.

This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Aizoon glinoides include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestive health, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Aizoon glinoides can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to treat various health issues, including skin problems, respiratory issues, and gastrointestinal disorders.
